name: Epangishimog Pakwejigan (Shuswap Bannock)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the water to the dry ingredients and stir quickly until just combined.
3. Spread the batter evenly on a greased pie plate.
4. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
5. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before cutting into pieces.
7. Serve hot or cold with mint tea.
